headline: Live Nation Entertainment Inc. (LYV): One of the Best Stocks to Buy According to Mark Cuban?
summary: We just covered the Mark Cuban Stock Portfolio: 8 Best Stocks to Buy and Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE:LYV) ranks 7th on this list.
